title: mitrephora calcarea
intro: Mitrephora calcarea is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the calcareous mitrephora. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Mitrephora calcarea can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
